prediction.reasoning: Based on CRM's historical volatility of approximately 30-35% annually, I estimated an 18-day standard deviation of ~2.7%. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with widening ranges to reflect increasing uncertainty at higher confidence levels.
